tech.subtitle: Technical notes platform community developed by Duckode, open to everyone.

about: Sharing insights from low-level design, and more experiments and analysis coming soon!

Tech Notes is an open platform where developers can register and share their technical insights.
As the moderator, I also contribute articles — deep dives into system architecture, including topics like rendering pipelines and low-level design.
Exploring Tech Notes latest coding projects!
